blended.narrative: Panorama Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 6,687 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 8" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 48°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
